sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108649" key="u(pokufw/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποκῡφώνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n108649.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">part of a chariot</tr_> (v. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κύφων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:143" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.143</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
